special_notes: Caster wheels typically require both a swivel (Z-axis) and a roll (X/Y-axis) joint. The current hierarchy groups the bracket ('fixer') and the wheel ('tire'/'body') under a single Xform. To simulate full caster behavior, the wheel meshes must be separated from the bracket into nested Xforms.
grip_location: handles on the top shelf for pushing/pulling
